summary: Added decision log viewer to desktop app. IPC handler (kernel:decisions:list) reads decisions.jsonl via StateIO + readLog(). Preload API extended with decisions.list(). Kernel store extended with decisions state + fetchDecisions(). LogTabContent replaced with real DecisionRow components showing outcome, capability type, agent ID, timestamps. Filter bar for Permit/Deny. Expandable rows show RS hash and triggered rules. Empty state when no entries exist. Build succeeds (464 modules).

verification.notes: All verification passed. build, lint, tests — all green.
